event: View of the lighthouse and harbor at Saint-Malo
description: A vibrant coastal scene showing a busy harbor filled with small sailboats and vessels on blue-green water. In the foreground, figures stroll along a stone jetty or promenade, carrying colorful parasols in red, orange, yellow, and blue. A small lighthouse stands at the end of the pier. Across the harbor, a fortified hilltop town with stone walls and a castle is visible. The sky is blue with scattered clouds. The palette is bright and cheerful with broad, dappled brushwork.
